_comment: NPC Security Decker template. Based on Matrix3 'Security Sysop' contact stats (p.127). Transys Highlander cyberdeck (MPCP 9). Hacking Pool 10 (floor((7+9)/3)=5 base, +2 Encephalon-2, +3 Math SPU-3). Deploys on Passive Alert to hunt the intruding decker via Locate Decker operation.
_deployment_rule: Active Alarms: Security decker joins next Combat Turn after Passive Alert triggers. Makes Locate Decker (Index op, TN=Index rating) using Scanner each turn to find the player. On success, they can initiate cybercombat.

_tiers.note: Scale security deckers to match host security code. The stats below are Orange/Red grade. See tier table.
_tiers.Orange: These stats — Computer 6 (Decking 8), Hacking Pool 10, MPCP 9
_tiers.UV: Computer 8 (Decking 12), Hacking Pool 15+, MPCP 12, fully optimized persona

name: Marcus Kane

deck.name: Transys Highlander
deck._note_deck: MPCP 9. Corporate-grade hardware — illegal to own without a security contractor license.
deck._note_attributes: Sum = 27 = MPCP×3. Evasion and Bod prioritized — he's built to fight, not sneak.
deck._note_ri: Response Increase 4 = +4D6 Matrix initiative. Sysops win by going first.

_note_hp: floor((INT 7 + MPCP 9) / 3) = 5 base, +2 Encephalon-2, +3 Math SPU-3 = 10 total.
_note_cs: Computer 6 (Decking 8). Uses specialization for all Matrix ops.

_npc_combat_behavior.turn1_after_passive_alert: Locate Decker (Index Test, Scanner-7 reduces TN). If success: initiate cybercombat with Attack program.
_npc_combat_behavior.turn2+: Maintain Locate Decker if still searching. In combat: full offensive — Attack-8, suppression pool 0 (he's offense-focused).
_npc_combat_behavior.on_active_alert: Calls in second security decker. Both focus fire on the intruder.
_npc_combat_behavior.retreat_condition: If Bod reduced to 0 or Evasion reduced to 0, dumps from Matrix. Does not pursue.

programs.name: Attack
programs._note: Primary weapon. Uses full Computer (Decking 8) + hacking pool in offensive cybercombat.

programs.name: Deception
programs._note: He knows his own host — Deception helps navigate the alarm state without triggering more tally.

programs.name: Analyze
programs._note: Analyze Icon (Free action) to ID the intruder's persona. Analyze IC to check own IC state.

programs.name: Scanner
programs._note: Required for Locate Decker. TN = host Index rating reduced by Scanner rating. He WILL find you.

programs.name: Browse
programs._note: Backup locate utility. He knows the host index better than you.

programs.name: Sleaze
programs._note: Low Sleaze — he's a defender, not a ghost. DF = ceil((Masking 5 + Sleaze 4) / 2) = 5. Not trying to hide.

programs.name: Spoof
programs._note: Used to commandeer slaved devices to cut off intruder escape routes.
